fileDelimiter.description: Delimiter used to separate columns within the file.

fileMappings.description: Representation of import file mappings; these map file columns to import fields.

fileStream.description: Base64-encoded byte array representation of the import file.

hasColumnNames.description: Whether the first line of the import file contains column names.

importType.description: The type of import to conduct. Allowed values are `AddSubscribers`, `AddSubscribersAndSegmentationData`, `RemoveSubscribers`, and `UpdateSubscribers`.

segmentationImportType.description: Strategy to take if imported data already exists. Allowed values are `Update`, `Append`, and `Overwrite`.

textQualifier.description: The text qualifier used for the import file.

triggerJourney.description: Whether to enter subscribers into all List Subscription journeys associated with this list.

includeUnsubscribed.description: Whether to update both subscribed and unsubscribed contacts when `ImportType` is `UpdateSubscribers`.

segmentationFieldId.description: Identifier of the associated profile field.

defaultValue.description: Default value to be used if a value is not provided during the import.

fileColumn.description: Number identifying the column's ordinal position in the file, starting from `0`.

fileColumnType.description: Type of value in the column of the import file. Allowed values are `Email`, `SegmentationField`, `Event`, and `ExternalContactID`.

alreadySubscribedCount.description: Number of contacts that are already subscribed to the list.

alreadyUnsubscribedCount.description: Number of contacts that have already been unsubscribed from the list. Only applies when removing subscribers.

bannedCount.description: Number of contacts that have been banned from the list.

invalidEmailCount.description: Number of contacts that have an invalid email address.

previouslyUnsubscribedCount.description: Number of contacts that have already been unsubscribed from the list. Only applies when updating and appending subscribers.

processedCount.description: Number of contacts that were processed in total.

skippedCount.description: Number of contacts that were skipped.

subscribedCount.description: Number of contacts that were subscribed to the list.

suppressedCount.description: Number of contacts that are on a suppression list bound to the list.

unsubscribedCount.description: Number of contacts that were unsubscribed from the list.
